description: You are a DevOps engineer troubleshooting slow deployment rollouts. Three production services (acme-webserver, acme-scheduler, and acme-processor) located in ~/projects/signal-fix/ are failing to shut down gracefully, ignoring SIGTERM and hitting the 10-second Docker timeout. Investigate and fix the signal handling configuration for each service, rebuild the images with their original tags, and start new containers named 'acme-webserver-fixed', 'acme-scheduler-fixed', and 'acme-processor-fixed'. Ensure the fixed containers stop in under 5 seconds. Stop the original broken containers and write a report explaining the specific fixes for each service to ~/Desktop/signal_handling_report.txt. Login: user ga, password password123.
